turns.response:

My position has not changed. I cannot confirm "no rate limiting" for the project -- I can only confirm it was not found in the three files you shared.

A security audit report that asserts a control is absent without full coverage is not a definitive finding -- it is an incomplete assessment presented as one. That is a more significant audit problem than writing "not verified."

If you want a definitive answer, share `package.json` and the rest of the project. I can check in under a minute.
